Terms of Service

Last updated: {{ lastUpdated }}

Welcome to yProHub. By accessing or using our platform — including the website, mobile applications, and all associated services — you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). Please read them carefully before posting a job, submitting a bid, or making any payment through yProHub. If you do not agree to these Terms, you must not use the platform.

1. Definitions

  • "Platform" means the yProHub website, apps, APIs, and all related services.
  • "User" means any individual who registers an account to post jobs or make payments.
  • "Pro" means any individual or business registered to offer services and submit bids.
  • "Job" means a service request posted by a User on the Platform.
  • "Bid" means a proposal submitted by a Pro in response to a Job posting.
  • "Agreement" means the contract formed between a User and a Pro when a Bid is accepted.

2. Acceptance & Eligibility

By creating an account you confirm that you are at least 18 years old, have the legal capacity to enter into binding contracts, and that all information you provide is accurate and up to date. yProHub reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or provide false information.

3. Job Postings

When you post a Job, you agree that:

  • The description is accurate and does not misrepresent the scope of work.
  • The Job does not request any illegal service or activity.
  • Your contact details and address information are correct and will only be shared with matched Pros.
  • You will respond to Bids in a timely manner and communicate professionally.
  • Posting the same Job multiple times to manipulate search results is prohibited.

4. Bidding & Service Agreements

Pros may submit Bids on any open Job. By accepting a Bid, the User and Pro enter into a direct Agreement for the provision of services. yProHub is not a party to that Agreement and is not responsible for the quality, safety, legality, or performance of services rendered. Pros are responsible for their own insurance, qualifications, and compliance with applicable laws and regulations.

Users must honour accepted Bids. Cancelling a Job after accepting a Bid without a legitimate reason may result in account suspension. Pros who fail to commence or complete agreed work may have their accounts reviewed or suspended.

5. Payments & Refunds

Payments are processed securely through our payment provider (Razorpay). By making a payment you agree to their terms of service in addition to these Terms.

  • Funds are held in escrow until the User confirms satisfactory completion of the Job.
  • Pros receive payment only after the User confirms completion or an admin resolves a dispute in the Pro's favour.
  • Refunds may be requested if a dispute is raised and resolved in the User's favour by yProHub admin.
  • yProHub charges Pros a platform service fee as disclosed at the time of registration. This fee is subject to change with 30 days' notice.
  • Chargebacks initiated outside the Platform dispute process may result in account suspension pending investigation.

6. Dispute Resolution

If you are dissatisfied with completed work, you may raise a dispute within 7 days of the completion notification. yProHub will review evidence from both parties and issue a binding decision within a reasonable timeframe. Both parties agree to cooperate fully with any investigation.

yProHub's decision is final for platform-level disputes. External legal action is not precluded, but any such action must be pursued independently of the platform dispute mechanism.

7. Prohibited Conduct

You must not:

  • Use the Platform for any unlawful purpose.
  • Post false, misleading, or defamatory content.
  • Circumvent yProHub's payment system by arranging off-platform payments.
  • Harass, threaten, or discriminate against other users or Pros.
  • Scrape, reverse-engineer, or attempt to gain unauthorised access to any part of the Platform.
  • Create multiple accounts to circumvent bans or rating systems.
  • Post personal contact information in public job descriptions to solicit off-platform agreements.

Violations may result in immediate account termination, withholding of funds, and referral to law enforcement where applicable.

8. Intellectual Property

All content on the Platform — including the yProHub brand, logo, interface design, and software — is the property of yProHub or its licensors and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without written permission.

Content you submit (job descriptions, profile information, messages) remains your property. You grant yProHub a non-exclusive, royalty-free licence to use, display, and distribute your content solely for the purpose of operating the Platform.

9. Privacy

Your use of the Platform is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. By using yProHub you consent to the collection and processing of personal data as described in the Privacy Policy. yProHub will never sell your personal data to third parties.

10. Disclaimers & Limitation of Liability

The Platform is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. yProHub does not warrant that the Platform will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of viruses.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, yProHub shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Platform, including loss of data, loss of profits, or personal injury arising from services rendered by a Pro. yProHub's total aggregate liability for any claim shall not exceed the total fees paid by you to yProHub in the 12 months preceding the claim.

11. Modifications to These Terms

yProHub may update these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email or a prominent notice on the Platform at least 14 days before they take effect. Continued use of the Platform after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

12. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with applicable law. Any disputes arising under or in connection with these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts.

13. Contact Us

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:

  • Email: legal@yprohub.com
  • Support: Contact Page
